_comment: ClaudeBox project-level configuration. Place as .claudebox.json in your project root.
_comment_language: Language override. Options: auto, none, dotnet, node, python, go, rust, java. Default: auto (detected from project files). Use 'none' for no language-specific setup.
_comment_claude_config_path: Path to a claude config directory (e.g., ~/structured-claude-config). Everything inside is copied into the container's ~/.claude/ at init. Conflicts are overwritten; existing files are preserved. Empty = disabled.
_comment_extra_domains: Additional domains to allow through the container firewall. Appended to language-specific domains.
_comment_extra_suffixes: Domain suffixes for wildcard firewall matching. Any subdomain of these is allowed.
_comment_extra_volumes: Additional named Docker volumes to mount. Key = volume name, value = mount path.
_comment_extra_apt_packages: Additional apt packages to install in the container.
_comment_extra_commands: Shell commands to run after language setup. Runs as the node user.
